title: adenandra fragrans
intro: Adenandra fragrans is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the 'Cape White Rosemary' due to its fragrant leaves and white flowers. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, as the leaves contain essential oils with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Adenandra fragrans include relief from indigestion, nausea, and headaches, making it a popular herbal remedy in some parts of the world. Adenandra fragrans can be prepared in various forms, such as teas, essential oils, and infusions, allowing for its benefits to be utilized in a range of applications.
